pages.title: About Us - BM Grand Hotel and Resort, Malda
text: BM Grand Hotel and Resorts is a luxurious oasis nestled in Malda, West Bengal, designed especially for families seeking the perfect getaway. Our commitment to excellence ensures that every aspect of your stay is exceptional, from our beautifully appointed rooms to our expansive recreational facilities.

At BM Grand, families can enjoy a myriad of activities, including a sprawling swimming pool, children's play area, and engaging workshops that cater to all ages. The stunning gardens provide a serene backdrop for relaxation, while our knowledgeable staff is always on hand to assist with your needs.

Whether it’s a family vacation, a reunion, or simply a weekend escape, BM Grand Hotel and Resorts promises an unmatched experience. Our unique blend of luxury, comfort, and personalized service is designed to create lasting memories for your family. Come, discover the magic of BM Grand—where every moment is cherished, and every family is treated like royalty.
BM Grand Hotel & Resorts Sahapur, Setumore, Malda, West Bengal

pages.title: BM Grand VIP Suite Room - BM Grand Hotel and Resort, Malda
text: If You Need Any Help Contact Us

Our VIP Suite rooms are the epitome of comfort and luxury. Share wonderful memories with your loved ones while you take advantage of the best amenities. These rooms will provide you the much needed comfort with a touch of uncompromised luxury. The perfect way to enjoy you holidays or work tour.

Furnished in the contemporary mannerisms, the room boasts luxury. The rooms offer a timeless appeal to our customers and are ideal for sharing moments of a beautiful vacation. Fitted with the best amenities, these rooms will provide you the comfort you seek.

pages.title: BM Grand Executive Suite Room - BM Grand Hotel and Resort, Malda
text: If You Need Any Help Contact Us

Our Executive Suite rooms are designed with latest architecture which has the rare combination of modern technology and traditional architecture. They are comparatively larger and have additional sitting areas. If you are looking forward to enjoying your vacation in Malda with your family or friends, then BM Grand Hotel & Resort is the best choice you can ever make.
Made with the idea of luxury and presented with the sense of comfort, our executive suite room bridges the idea of comfortable luxury.
